description: You are a repair technician preparing for an 'iPhone 13 Battery Replacement'. Locate the official iFixit repair guide for the standard iPhone 13 battery replacement and create a checklist text file at /home/ga/Desktop/iphone13_battery_checklist.txt. The file must include the header 'iPhone 13 Battery Replacement Checklist', the 'Difficulty' and 'Time Required' estimates from the guide, a list of all required 'Tools', and a 'Notes' section containing the text of the urgent safety warning regarding battery handling (fire or puncture hazards).
